SECRET_KEY.description: JWT signing secret — generate with: python -c "import secrets; print(secrets.token_hex(32))"

ADMIN_EMAIL.description: Email for the auto-seeded admin account

ADMIN_PASSWORD.description: Password for the admin account — must be changed from default

DATABASE_URL.description: PostgreSQL URL (optional — defaults to SQLite). Format: postgresql://user:pass@host:5432/dbname

VITE_API_URL.description: Backend API base URL. Set to: https://<backend-service-domain>/api/v1
